nodes.label: Accessibility-First Selector Convention
nodes.rationale: Use accessibility role/name selectors exclusively (getByRole). Never use raw text, test IDs, or nth-child. Mandatory convention for all playbooks.

nodes.label: Dashboard Onboarding State Machine
nodes.rationale: Complex onboarding state machine spanning 3 states (fresh: 3 cards, mid: 2 cards, active: 0 cards) with progressive reveal based on user progress.

nodes.label: Test+Save Split Workflow
nodes.rationale: Pre-save handshake validation and post-save test. Critical path for all other features (profiles, sessions) -- failure here blocks entire app.

nodes.label: Single-Session Lock (ADR-0020)
nodes.rationale: Prevents concurrent sessions. Returns 409 Conflict when attempting to start a second session. User must cancel the active session first.
